This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"registerHostVouchersAndPayFee(bytes32[],uint8)":{"details":"The host must first approve this contract to spend the required USDT amount.      totalFee = getHostVoucherFeeTier(tier) * voucherIds.length, USDT 6 decimals.","params":{"tier":"Fee tier: 0 = hours (\u226424h), 1 = days (\u226430d), 2 = months (>30d)","voucherIds":"Array of voucher identifiers (off-chain IDs, e.g. bytes32 codes)"}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. addTokenToWhitelist(address).details: Prevents malicious tokens from being used as payment

isReentrancyGuardActive().details: Returns true if the reentrancy guard is currently active.

returns._0: True if the guard is active, false otherwise.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

processBatchPayments((uint256,uint256,by.details: Limits: max 50 payments per batch, total batch amount must not exceed daily limit

processPayment(uint256,uint256,bytes32).details: Enforces max individual payment, daily limits, and prevents double processing. Daily limit is consumed only on success.

params._contractId: The ID of the network contract
params._grossAmount: The total amount paid by the user (in USDT, 6 decimals)
params._voucherId: Unique voucher ID to prevent double processing

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

registerHostVouchersAndPayFee(bytes32[],.details: The host must first approve this contract to spend the required USDT amount.      totalFee = getHostVoucherFeeTier(tier) * voucherIds.length, USDT 6 decimals.

params.voucherIds: Array of voucher identifiers (off-chain IDs, e.g. bytes32 codes)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

addTokenToWhitelist(address).notice: Add a token to the whitelist (owner only)

getWhitelistedTokens().notice: Get the list of whitelisted tokens

isTokenWhitelisted(address).notice: Check if a token is whitelisted

isVoucherProcessed(bytes32).notice: Check if voucher has been processed

processBatchPayments((uint256,uint256,by.notice: Process a batch of payments for vouchers with enhanced security controls

processPayment(uint256,uint256,bytes32).notice: Process a payment for a voucher with enhanced security controls

registerHostVouchersAndPayFee(bytes32[],.notice: Register host-created vouchers on-chain and pay the platform registration fee in USDT.

removeTokenFromWhitelist(address).notice: Remove a token from the whitelist (owner only)

withdrawToken(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw USDT to recipient (owner only). Counts toward daily limit.
